title: Trump’s Defense Department Sees Growing Espionage Threat From Israel
summary_full: The Defense Department has increased the counterintelligence threat assessment to its highest level, and Israel is believed to have eavesdropped on American negotiations with Iran.
summary_public: The Defense Department has increased the counterintelligence threat assessment to its highest level, and Israel is believed to have eavesdropped on American negotiations with Iran.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel is believed to have eavesdropped on American negotiations with Iran
